scripts.build: npm -w apps/api exec tsc -- --build tsconfig.json && npm -w apps/web exec tsc -- --build tsconfig.build.json && npm -w apps/web exec vite build && npm -w packages/db exec tsc -- --build tsconfig.json && npm -w packages/shared exec tsc -- --build tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npm -w apps/api exec tsc -- --noEmit --project tsconfig.json && npm -w apps/web exec tsc -- --noEmit --project tsconfig.json && npm -w packages/db exec tsc -- --noEmit --project tsconfig.json && npm -w packages/shared exec tsc -- --noEmit --project tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm -w apps/api exec vitest run && npm -w apps/web exec vitest run && npm -w packages/db exec vitest run && npm -w packages/shared exec vitest run
